description: 链客宝AI Metabase 预置分析问题 — 导入到 Metabase 后可直接使用

questions.name: 每日活跃用户趋势
questions.description: 统计每天有过页面访问的用户数（基于PostHog page_view事件或本地订单/名片活动）

native.query:
SELECT
    DATE(u.created_at) AS day,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS active_users
FROM users u
WHERE u.is_deleted = false
  AND u.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY DATE(u.created_at)
ORDER BY day ASC

metadata.description: 展示过去30天每日活跃用户趋势，帮助了解用户参与度变化

questions.name: 名片生成量按天
questions.description: 统计每天AI数字名片的生成数量趋势

native.query:
SELECT
    DATE(bc.created_at) AS day,
    COUNT(bc.id) AS cards_generated
FROM business_cards bc
WHERE bc.is_deleted = false
  AND bc.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY DATE(bc.created_at)
ORDER BY day ASC

metadata.description: 展示每日AI名片生成量，评估名片功能的采用率和使用趋势

questions.name: 供需匹配成功率
questions.description: 统计发布需求的用户中，有多少最终转化为订单（供需匹配效率）

native.query:
WITH need_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM business_needs
    WHERE is_deleted = false
      AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
),
order_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM orders
    WHERE is_deleted = false
      AND status IN ('paid', 'shipped', 'received')
      AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
),
card_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM business_cards
    WHERE is_deleted = false
      AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
)
SELECT '注册用户' AS stage, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS user_count
FROM users u
WHERE u.is_deleted = false
  AND u.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
UNION ALL
SELECT '已创建名片' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM card_users
UNION ALL
SELECT '已发布需求' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM need_users
UNION ALL
SELECT '已完成订单' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM order_users

metadata.description: 从注册→名片→需求→订单的完整转化漏斗，评估供需匹配效率

questions.name: 付费转化率
questions.description: 计算整体付费转化率：注册用户中有多少比例完成了支付

native.query:
WITH stats AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS total_users,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS paying_users
    FROM users u
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
        AND o.is_deleted = false
        AND o.status IN ('paid', 'shipped', 'received')
    WHERE u.is_deleted = false
)
SELECT
    total_users,
    paying_users,
    ROUND(paying_users::numeric / NULLIF(total_users, 0) * 100, 2) AS conversion_rate
FROM stats

metadata.description: 整体付费转化率=支付用户数/总注册用户数，按月追踪变化

questions.name: 用户来源渠道分布
questions.description: 统计用户按角色和来源的分布情况

native.query:
SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(role, ''), '未知') AS role,
    COUNT(id) AS user_count
FROM users
WHERE is_deleted = false
GROUP BY role
ORDER BY user_count DESC

metadata.description: 按用户角色分布的饼图，了解用户构成（buyer/promoter/supplier/admin）

dashboards.name: 链客宝AI运营总览
dashboards.description: 核心运营指标看板，包含用户增长、转化漏斗、收入趋势
